name: Pylon
description: An AI-native B2B support platform that unifies omnichannel customer conversations into a single interface with built-in AI agents for automated routing, resolution, and account intelligence.
notes: Pylon exposes a public API (referenced in navigation) and supports deep integration with ticketing, CRMs, and project management tools, making it highly suitable for agentic tooling. [human-verified: Paid plan required. No free tier. Demo required to onboard.]
